summary: Frontend testing completed for LEXA Lifestyle persona pages redesign. All 4 persona pages (homeowner, architect, developer, commercial) have been redesigned to image-driven layouts with fullscreen heroes, 4 showcase sections each, and working CTAs. PersonaModal and homepage hero CTA band verified.

issues: CTA band bottom edge at 769px vs viewport 768px - visible but at edge boundary. Minor: Consider reducing hero flex space by ~10px for cleaner fit on 1366x768.

details: CTA button 'Private Design Session' clickable - opens ConsultationForm
4 showcase sections with images (showcase-0 to showcase-3)
Solution links navigate correctly (tested: Smart Lighting -> /solutions/lighting-automation)
Bottom CTA section present with 'Get Started' button
Hero section 85vh with fullscreen design studio image
CTA button 'Partner With Us' opens ConsultationForm
Hero section 85vh with luxury villa development image
Hero section 85vh with luxury commercial interior image
'Find Your Perfect Solution' button present and clickable
CTA band position: top 709px, bottom 769px (edge of viewport)
PersonaModal opens via 'Find Your Perfect Solution' button
4 persona cards displayed (HOMEOWNER, ARCHITECT/DESIGNER, DEVELOPER, COMMERCIAL)
'Skip for now' link closes modal correctly
Uses createPortal rendering for proper z-index handling

critical_code_review_comments: All persona pages use consistent image-driven design pattern with proper data-testid attributes
AI-generated images from static.prod-images.emergentagent.com load correctly
ConsultationForm integration working on all CTA buttons
PersonaModal correctly uses createPortal to bypass ancestor CSS filter issues
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 persona pages (homeowner, architect, developer, commercial) verified with image-driven layouts. Each has: 85vh hero with AI-generated images, 4 alternating showcase sections, and working CTA buttons that open ConsultationForm. PersonaModal navigation from homepage verified. Hero CTA band visible at 1366x768.
